summary: Evidence command boundary refactor is reviewable: evidence add/prune now use narrow imports, module-boundary test prevents wide core/lifecycle barrel regression, evidence/domain tests pass, and TypeScript compilation passes.

sources.label: opennori-self-evidence-command-import-boundary
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

sources.label: npx vitest run test/cli-evidence.test.js test/evidence.test.js test/module-boundaries.test.js
sources.command: npx vitest run test/cli-evidence.test.js test/evidence.test.js test/module-boundaries.test.js

reviewability: Open the referenced source files and rerun the two commands to verify the evidence CLI stays on narrow deterministic state modules.
limitations: This proves the evidence command boundary only; remaining CLI command groups still require separate boundary slices.
